body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/city/getAllCity 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/city/getAllCity 
 ## 接口描述 
查询智能费控差旅的所有城市信息 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","exampleValue":"XFT00001","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"8","name":"OPAUID","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"ARRAY","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityNameEn","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"HangZhou","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"countryNamEn","required":false,"label":"%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"China","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityName","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"cityCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"12","desc":"%20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"countryNam","required":false,"label":"%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
```json
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/common/city/getAllCity?OPAUID=XFT00001
```

###返回示例
```json
[
	{
		"cityNameEn":"HangZhou",
		"countryNamEn":"China",
		"cityName":"杭州",
		"cityCode":"12",
		"countryNam":"中国"
	}
]
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/city/getAllCity

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/city/getAllCity

接口描述

查询智能费控差旅的所有城市信息

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","exampleValue":"XFT00001","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"8","name":"OPAUID","required":true}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"ARRAY","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityNameEn","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"HangZhou","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"countryNamEn","required":false,"label":"%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"China","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityName","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"cityCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"12","desc":"%20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"countryNam","required":false,"label":"%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例

{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/common/city/getAllCity?OPAUID=XFT00001

###返回示例

[
	{
		"cityNameEn":"HangZhou",
		"countryNamEn":"China",
		"cityName":"杭州",
		"cityCode":"12",
		"countryNam":"中国"
	}
]

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
